name: Mocha Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the instant coffee crystals until you have a fine ground mixture.
2. In a bowl, mix together the powdered milk, sugar substitute, cocoa powder, coffee mixture, water, almond extract, dry oatmeal, and crunchy peanut butter until well combined.
3. Roll the mixture into 12 balls.
4. Chill on waxed paper.
